name: Lost Cities
description: Lost Cities is a two-player card game about embarking on expeditions to far-flung locales. Players play cards in ascending value within five suits, optionally laying handshake cards to multiply their score — but each expedition starts at a deficit, so committing to one means trusting that you'll find enough cards to climb out. Every turn forces a tradeoff between starting a risky new column and discarding a card the opponent might claim.
